zh.Hussey Manor, Standen, Berkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾曼諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Mathew Hughes於1215年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Henry de Hughes I28歲，母親Cecily de Stanton36歲。他和Agnes de Sanford至少有3個兒子。他去世於1252年2月14日在英國享年37歲，埋葬在英國波克夏格福德。

zh-hans.Hussey Manor, Standen, Berkshire, Englan: 英国英格兰越可爾曼諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Mathew Hughes于1215年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Henry de Hughes I28岁，母亲Cecily de Stanton36岁。他和Agnes de Sanford至少有3个儿子。他去世于1252年2月14日在英国享年37岁，埋葬在英国波克夏格福德。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Mathew Hughes was born in 1215, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Henry de Hughes I, was 28 and his mother, Cecily de Stanton, was 36. He had at least 3 sons with Agnes de Sanford. He died on 14 February 1252, in England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Hungerford, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Mathew Hughes est né en 1215, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Hughes I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Stanton, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Agnes de Sanford. Il est décédé le 14 février 1252, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Hungerford, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Mathew Hughes 1215 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Hughes I 28 und seine Mutter Cecily de Stanton 36. Er hatte mit Agnes de Sanford mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 14. Februar 1252 im Alter von 37 Jahren in England und wurde in Hungerford, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Mathew Hughes è nato il nel 1215 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Hughes I, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Stanton, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Agnes de Sanford. Morì il 14 febbraio 1252, nel England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Hungerford, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Mathew Hughesが1215年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Hughes Iは28歳，母Cecily de Stantonは36歳であった。彼はAgnes de Sanfordとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1252年2月14日にイギリスで37歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアハンジャーフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Mathew Hughes(이)가 1215년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Hughes I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Stanton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Agnes de Sanford(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 2월 14일 영국에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 헌그르퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Mathew Hughes nasceu em 1215, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Hughes I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Stanton, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Agnes de Sanford. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1252, em Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Hungerford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Mathew Hughes родился в 1215 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Hughes I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Stanton, 36. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Agnes de Sanford. Он умер 14 февраля 1252 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности хунгирфорд, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Mathew Hughes nació en 1215, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Hughes I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Cecily de Stanton, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Agnes de Sanford. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1252, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Hungerford, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
